title: MetricStreamEntry
description: Contains information about a metric stream.

Arn.description: The ARN of the metric stream.

CreationDate.description: The date when the metric stream was created.

LastUpdateDate.description: The date when the metric stream was last updated.

Name.description: The name of the metric stream.

FirehoseArn.description: The ARN of the Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream used by this metric stream.

State.description: The current state of the metric stream.

OutputFormat.description: The output format of the metric stream.
